entities.name: CHEF USE CASE
entities.description: A project targeting the central highland region of Kenya to improve and sustain the health, diversity, and productivity of croplands and rangelands

entities.name: CENTRAL HIGHLAND REGION OF KENYA
entities.description: The target region of the CHEF Use Case, consisting of eleven counties transitioning through various production zones

entities.name: WATER TOWERS
entities.description: Geographic features within the central highland region of Kenya

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER TRANSITION ZONE
entities.description: A specific production zone within the central highland region of Kenya

entities.name: SEMIARID PRODUCTION ZONE
entities.description: A specific production zone within the central highland region of Kenya

entities.name: RANGELANDS
entities.description: Areas of open land for grazing within the central highland region of Kenya

entities.name: CROPLANDS
entities.description: Areas of land used for growing crops within the central highland region of Kenya

entities.name: LAND HEALTH AND PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The health, diversity, and productivity of croplands and rangelands

entities.name: LAND USE SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems governing how land is utilized in the region

entities.name: AGRIFOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems encompassing the production, processing, and distribution of food

entities.name: PRODUCTION DECLINE
entities.description: The decrease in agricultural output driven by the interaction of land use and agrifood systems

entities.name: DEPLETION OF ECOSYSTEM SERVICES AND BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The loss of natural ecosystem functions and biological diversity

entities.name: FOODSCAPES-SCALE APPROACH
entities.description: An approach embedded in the CHEF Use Case to design and action interventions sensitized to local contexts

entities.name: TRADITIONAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Local and indigenous knowledge bridged with nature-based interventions

entities.name: NATURE-BASED INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Scalable interventions based on nature to drive food systems transformation

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: An inclusive and sustainable change in the food system

entities.name: REGENERATIVE PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices aimed at restoring soil health and ecosystem function

entities.name: INNOVATIONS
entities.description: New methods or ideas implemented to improve food production archetypes

relationships.target: DEPLETION OF ECOSYSTEM SERVICES AND BIODIVERSITY
